mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-1C — Baseline Comparison and Safe Capacity Guidance

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
support={"Z:\\\\FOXAI\\\\System\\\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\\\PC_RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON_CONTRACT_V1.json": [3297, "d89c0487cf535af58a4cb673161dbde36ff836baf1c45de29903bd006d2cd6d9"], "Z:\\\\FOXAI\\\\System\\\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\\\README_V1B1C.md": [835, "c3764a576524dbde3428008825a5b50401515e4c26130f66e8baffce03231bf3"], "Z:\\\\FOXAI\\\\System\\\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\\\pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py": [41291, "74c42992fac82d71846c40ac8d0fb776ace93a4a6bb4202e492a0fd56a8662c7"]}
for name,(size,digest) in support.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data),size)
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
compile(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b1c>","exec")
unchanged={"Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py": "8c3af6d6f8d5a21a03fbd5c97eabd58280718a195c65f51a2b9201ff84ec798b", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_loaded_resource_capture_v1.py": "1dee5e6e0870a75a7a38181095849880f43acd78caf6782ea17cf932e5ddb146", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_resource_comparison_v1.py": "04669d22982315e902abba818c1c2c44a4f622997c9b8346cc0357cf0306fbdc", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py": "a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b", "Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py": "d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952", "Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py": "a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"}
for name,digest in unchanged.items():
 assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
sources=[(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "19a76bef2adf4f88ba495ed8abcf48e356b52f628de97eccabaf6a334fbd7c82", "MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "83b37ebcdb6b5882573f74e96f81b42296e4d6a6fc7a2f1e9a9158c8546ae76f", "MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json": "c300ef1e519b0dc0be949d528034ad8548392e0791e544ce70e4a650f7a09026", "MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "5ca895a436b91047b095a97efaaa7de2e23ea35555c9b17664a844826db1c639"}),(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169_V1B1B_R1_NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"NORMAL_LOADED_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "d061a6d75417debea27b7fcd4be552aa99009058eece6f47fcd8e1a4e3150685", "NORMAL_LOADED_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "58e1d3be02d064066b9bec96aca551ea98c4d8fac2e537e8e50847f85eac4c5f", "NORMAL_LOADED_QUALIFICATION.json": "79d1589bc0d2787f6effddab1eb432eed90ca4523e7b74f8b2b0037def691b45", "NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "cf415b6aaa2eb6a6b52ccfbc27ff99e0b5a79b6cd5ad060a3597ba86d0ba4fcb"})]
for root,expected in sources:
 for name,digest in expected.items():
  assert hashlib.sha256((root/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,(root,name)
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=[
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/PC_RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON_CONTRACT_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B1C.md",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py",
]
normalized=sorted(row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert len(entries)==3 and normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout)
assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==5
assert obj["authoritative_input_count"]==8
assert obj["stable_ids"] is True and obj["canonical_lf_only"] is True
assert obj["arithmetic_delta_consistency"] is True
assert obj["qualified_minimal_fixture"] is True
assert obj["qualified_loaded_fixture"] is True
assert obj["receipt_relationship_fixture"] is True
assert obj["no_live_scan_design"] is True
assert obj["recommendations_excluded"] is True
assert obj["diagnosis_excluded"] is True
assert obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Run isolated V1B-1C comparison component self-test
validations.stdout: {"arithmetic_delta_consistency": true, "authoritative_input_count": 8, "canonical_lf_only": true, "diagnosis_excluded": true, "k_path_excluded": true, "no_live_scan_design": true, "output_count": 5, "qualified_loaded_fixture": true, "qualified_minimal_fixture": true, "receipt_relationship_fixture": true, "recommendations_excluded": true, "stable_ids": true, "status": "ok"}

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
expected=["RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json", "FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json", "CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_REPORT.md", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json"]
files=sorted(p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())
assert files==sorted(expected),(files,expected)
for name in expected:
 p=out/name; data=p.read_bytes()
 assert b"\r" not in data,name
 data.decode("utf-8")
 if name.endswith(".json"):
  obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))
  canonical=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
  assert data==canonical,name
assert sum((out/name).stat().st_size for name in expected)<4*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1C_EXACT_FIVE_UTF8_LF_OUTPUTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate exactly five deterministic UTF-8 LF-only outputs

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
comparison=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
source=comparison["source_evidence"]
assert source["verified_input_count"]==8
assert len(source["verified_inputs"])==8
assert all(row["sha256_matches_expected"] is True for row in source["verified_inputs"])
assert source["minimal_qualification_status"]=="qualified_minimal_load"
assert source["normal_loaded_qualification_status"]=="qualified_normal_loaded"
assert len(source["capture_relationships"])==2
assert all(row["output_relationship_verified"] is True and row["blocker_count"]==0 for row in source["capture_relationships"])
roots=[(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "19a76bef2adf4f88ba495ed8abcf48e356b52f628de97eccabaf6a334fbd7c82", "MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "83b37ebcdb6b5882573f74e96f81b42296e4d6a6fc7a2f1e9a9158c8546ae76f", "MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json": "c300ef1e519b0dc0be949d528034ad8548392e0791e544ce70e4a650f7a09026", "MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "5ca895a436b91047b095a97efaaa7de2e23ea35555c9b17664a844826db1c639"}),(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169_V1B1B_R1_NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"NORMAL_LOADED_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "d061a6d75417debea27b7fcd4be552aa99009058eece6f47fcd8e1a4e3150685", "NORMAL_LOADED_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "58e1d3be02d064066b9bec96aca551ea98c4d8fac2e537e8e50847f85eac4c5f", "NORMAL_LOADED_QUALIFICATION.json": "79d1589bc0d2787f6effddab1eb432eed90ca4523e7b74f8b2b0037def691b45", "NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "cf415b6aaa2eb6a6b52ccfbc27ff99e0b5a79b6cd5ad060a3597ba86d0ba4fcb"})]
for root,expected in roots:
 for name,digest in expected.items():
  assert hashlib.sha256((root/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,(root,name)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1C_EIGHT_INPUTS_QUALIFICATIONS_AND_RELATIONSHIPS_OK")

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
c=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
metrics={row["metric"]:row for row in c["metric_comparisons"]}
def delta(name): return metrics[name]["delta_loaded_minus_minimal"]["value"]
assert delta("total_physical_memory_bytes")==0
assert delta("available_physical_memory_bytes")==-33886953472
assert delta("physical_memory_in_use_bytes")==33886953472
assert abs(delta("memory_load_percent")-66.17)<1e-9
assert delta("committed_bytes")==19086704640
assert delta("commit_limit_bytes")==0
assert delta("page_file_allocated_mib")==0
assert delta("page_file_current_usage_mib")==-80
assert delta("page_file_peak_usage_mib")==0
assert delta("process_count")==12
assert delta("foxai_workspace_process_count")==3
a=json.loads((out/"FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
components={row["component"]:row for row in a["component_working_set_comparisons"]}
assert components["shared_model_runtime"]["normal_loaded"]["value"]==29876736000
assert components["comfyui_idle_runtime"]["normal_loaded"]["value"]==567324672
assert components["foxai_desktop"]["normal_loaded"]["value"]==94650368
assert components["foxai_webui"]["minimal_load"]["value"]==76312576
assert components["foxai_webui"]["normal_loaded"]["value"]==82599936
h=json.loads((out/"CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
obs={row["observation"]:row for row in h["observations"]}
assert obs["normal_loaded_available_physical_memory"]["value_bytes"]==8379232256
assert obs["normal_loaded_physical_memory_headroom_percent"]["value_percent"]==16.36
assert obs["normal_loaded_commit_headroom"]["value_bytes"]==26655019008
assert h["recommendations_issued"] is False and h["diagnosis_issued"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1C_ARITHMETIC_ATTRIBUTION_AND_HEADROOM_OK")
validations.name: Validate arithmetic deltas, component attribution, and bounded headroom observations

for name,digest in unchanged.items():
 assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
r=json.loads((out/"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert r["status"]=="compared_and_verified"
assert r["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11"
assert r["output_count"]==5 and r["authoritative_input_count"]==8
assert len(r["outputs_before_receipt"])==4
for row in r["outputs_before_receipt"]:
 data=(out/row["name"]).read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"]
sources=[(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-062243-69C555_V1B1A_R2_MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"MINIMAL_LOAD_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "19a76bef2adf4f88ba495ed8abcf48e356b52f628de97eccabaf6a334fbd7c82", "MINIMAL_LOAD_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "83b37ebcdb6b5882573f74e96f81b42296e4d6a6fc7a2f1e9a9158c8546ae76f", "MINIMAL_LOAD_QUALIFICATION.json": "c300ef1e519b0dc0be949d528034ad8548392e0791e544ce70e4a650f7a09026", "MINIMAL_LOAD_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "5ca895a436b91047b095a97efaaa7de2e23ea35555c9b17664a844826db1c639"}),(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-140518-F13169_V1B1B_R1_NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_BASELINE"),{"NORMAL_LOADED_CAPTURE_RECEIPT.json": "d061a6d75417debea27b7fcd4be552aa99009058eece6f47fcd8e1a4e3150685", "NORMAL_LOADED_PROCESS_SUMMARY.json": "58e1d3be02d064066b9bec96aca551ea98c4d8fac2e537e8e50847f85eac4c5f", "NORMAL_LOADED_QUALIFICATION.json": "79d1589bc0d2787f6effddab1eb432eed90ca4523e7b74f8b2b0037def691b45", "NORMAL_LOADED_RESOURCE_SNAPSHOT.json": "cf415b6aaa2eb6a6b52ccfbc27ff99e0b5a79b6cd5ad060a3597ba86d0ba4fcb"})]
for root,expected in sources:
 for name,digest in expected.items():
  assert hashlib.sha256((root/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,(root,name)
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())<4*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B1C_RECEIPT_SOURCE_PRESERVATION_AND_SIZE_OK")
validations.name: Validate comparison receipt, authoritative source preservation, and output size ceiling
